design.description: Initial automation checkpoint for Purchase Order Request in FMT PRO: login, open Purchase Order bottom tab, open request form from plus icon, select supplier, and continue with Next.
ui_components: Bottom-right plus icon to raise purchase order request

flows.name: Login to FMT PRO, open Purchase Order Request form, select supplier, and continue
steps: Run FMT PRO suite with valid QA credentials from .env
Verify Purchase Order Request form opens
Search and select supplier vimal traders
Verify Purchase Order Request flow continues

business_rules: Purchase Order tab is reachable from the main FMT PRO screen.
Bottom-right plus icon opens Purchase Order Request form.
Select Supplier opens a bottom sheet and allows supplier selection.
Next button continues the purchase order request flow after supplier selection.
validations: Authenticated session is not on /login URL.
Purchase Order tab click opens Purchase Order section.
Plus icon click opens Purchase Order Request form.
Supplier vimal traders is selected from supplier bottom sheet.
Next click continues Purchase Order Request flow.

selector_hints.notes: Fallback includes data-testid and aria-label contains purchase-order.
Typically a bottom-right floating action button.

test_data.credentials: Use FMT_PRO_USERNAME and FMT_PRO_PASSWORD from .env, fallback USERNAME/PASSWORD
